title: Rotate Service Account Secrets
description:
Service account secrets expire after the duration specified when created,
anywhere from 8 hours to 365 days.
When it's time to rotate the secret, Atlas returns the alert
Service Account Secrets are about to expire.

headings.text: Step 3: Click the name of a service account.
Step 4: Generate a new client secret.
Step 5: Update your application with the new client secret.
Step 6: Delete the old client secret.
